info.title: Visitors Service API
info.description: The Web API for managing visits and visitors in SmartAccess ecosystem

post.summary: Changes the visitors list of a Visit
post.description: Adds and/or removes visitors from the visitors list

get.description: Returns a paged list of Visits

post.description: Schedule a new visit with the given data

get.description: Returns a visit by its ID
Returns a visit by its invitation ID

post.description: Sets  whether parking is available for this visit
Changes the location of a visit
Changes the start and/or end times of a visit

get.description: Announce the arrival a visitor for a visit

post.description: Confirm the visitor for the visit with the given Id

get.description: Returns a paged list of Visitor invitations
Returns a paged list of Visitors
Returns a paged list of visits of a visitor by its id

get.summary: Get one visit of a visitor
get.description: Returns a single visit of a visitor by its email and visit ID

get.summary: Get visit info for a visitor
get.description: Returns a limited visit info for a visitor. Allows anonymous access
Returns a visitor by its email
Returns a visitor by its ID

put.description: Update the visitor with the given ID

get.description: Returns a png with the provided QR code
Returns a paged list of Locations

post.description: Registers a new location which is local for the Visitors service

get.description: Returns a location by its ID

post.description: Stores the visitor's badgeType per tenant

get.description: Retrieves the visitor's badgeType configuration for the specified tenant
Retrieves a list of available access control systems that can be used for visitor access policies.
Retrieves a list of available access control rules for the given ac system

get.summary: Get available access control badge types
get.description: Retrieves a list of available access control badge types for the given ac system
Retrieves a list of available printers for printing visitor labels

get.summary: Get visit organizers by date range
get.description: Returns a list of unique visit organizers' names for visits taking place within the specified date range.

get.summary: Get the visit and visitor associated with this token
get.description: Get the visit and visitor associated with this token

get.summary: Get the name of visit organizers
get.description: Returns a list of visit organizers' names for a specific visit.
Returns onboarding images filtered by visit and/or visitor. At least one filter parameter must be provided.

post.summary: Print a label for a visitor
post.description: Start a printer's job for printing a visitor's label

get.description: Retrieves a label template for requested purpose

delete.description: Deletes a label template for requested purpose

post.description: Stores the JSON templatedata for requested purpose

get.description: CheckIn a visitor for a visit

post.description: Records that a visitor has been onboarded with additional data
